name: vercel-deploy
description:
Vercel deployment config for Next.js. Adds vercel.json with security headers (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy), framework hint, and build/install commands. Pattern source: LuxeBook apps/booking/vercel.json + apps/admin/vercel.json.

Deploy via: `vercel` (or push to a Vercel-linked git branch).
